name: Sine Wave
description: Plots a 440 Hz sine wave using the DSP library

name: FFT and Hamming Window
description: Shows the effect of a Hamming window on the FFT of a sum of sines, with inverse FFT reconstruction

name: Antenna Angle Detection
description: 2-antenna direction finding: recovers signal arrival angle from phase difference, sweeps -80 to +80 degrees

name: SHA-256 CSPRNG Quality
description: Compares two 16-bit output methods from a SHA-256 block CSPRNG: fixed slice vs folded sum. Histograms both and computes mean, variance and chi-squared to verify uniform distribution

name: Drawing to canvas
description: Shows how to create a canvas and draw into it. Uses the display_extensions.

name: Rotating Cube
description: Animates a rotating 3D wireframe cube using the display extensions and wasm-create-canvas.

name: Shannon-Whittaker Reconstruction
description: Samples a 990 Hz sine at 2 kHz (near Nyquist) then reconstructs it at 20 kHz using Shannon-Whittaker sinc interpolation.

name: RSA Encryption
description: Demonstrates RSA encrypt and decrypt using 2048-bit keys and the bignum extensions.

name: TTF Font Rendering
description: Loads Ubuntu Regular from Google Fonts and renders Hello World to a canvas using the TTF extensions.

name: Filesystem
description: Demonstrates file I/O using the Emscripten MEMFS: writes binary and text files, reads them back, lists the filesystem, and downloads the files to disk.

name: Dash35b Testbench
description: Interactive testbench for the VESC dash35b display package. Runs the dashboard with simulated stats and buttons for Page, Mode and Light.
